name: presentations
description: Create, render, verify, and export editable PowerPoint PPTX decks locally in Anybox.

interface.longDescription: Create, render, inspect, verify, and export editable PowerPoint PPTX decks locally with code-first slide modules, PNG previews, layout JSON, and QA checks.
defaultPrompt: Create an editable PowerPoint deck from this outline
Turn these notes into a polished slide deck
Build a presentation and verify every slide visually
